svg.text: Dark mobile cloud-drive client: browse, upload, offline files, camera backup, share links, and sync visibility.
Reference tokens: bg #050508 · surface #07070E · nav #0F0F1A · accent #7C6AF7 · bottom nav 64dp

g.text: Back up new photos to GyenBox
1. Mobile sync means on-demand download, selective offline files, camera backup, and app-scoped changes.
2. Full bidirectional refresh requires a backend change cursor; before that, pages use cached lists plus pull-to-refresh.
3. Shared tab is intentionally staged because the current backend exposes create-share but not full list/revoke/update endpoints.
4. Every long upload or download has visible progress, retry, cancel, and a notification path.
